description_long: This nightstand features a compact, round design with a dark, solid top surface and a wooden band encircling its edge. The top is supported by three slender, black metal legs that are evenly spaced and connected by a circular metal stretcher for added stability. The legs are straight and slightly splayed, giving the piece a modern, industrial look. The nightstand lacks any visible drawers, handles, or decorative elements, emphasizing a minimalist aesthetic. Its small size and sturdy construction make it suitable for use in tight urban spaces such as apartments, lofts, or garages. The materials and build suggest it is both durable and easy to move.
description: A small, round nightstand with a dark top, wooden edge, and three black metal legs connected by a circular stretcher. Its minimalist, industrial design is compact and sturdy.
description_view_0: The nightstand is seen from a slight angle, showing the round top, wooden edge, and all three metal legs with the connecting stretcher clearly visible.
description_view_1: This view presents the nightstand more frontally, highlighting the circular top and the even spacing of the three legs, with the stretcher partially visible.
description_view_2: The nightstand is viewed from another angle, showing the round top and two of the three legs more prominently, with the stretcher visible beneath.
description_view_3: This view is similar to view 2 but from the opposite side, again showing the round top, wooden edge, and the arrangement of the legs and stretcher.
attribute_leg_design: three straight black metal legs with circular stretcher
attribute_placement_relative_to_other_ur: beside a bed or against a wall
